issue_summary: rename/deprecate numeric classes in favor of dimensional values
javadoc_before:
/** * NumericType: if non-null then the field's value will be indexed * numerically so that {@link NumericRangeQuery} can be used at * search time. *

* The default is null (no numeric type) * @see #setNumericType(NumericType) */
javadoc_after:
/** * LegacyNumericType: if non-null then the field's value will be indexed * numerically so that {@link org.apache.lucene.search.LegacyNumericRangeQuery} can be used at * search time. *

* The default is null (no numeric type) * @see #setNumericType(org.apache.lucene.document.FieldType.LegacyNumericType) */
